response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:41: Promotional intro with instrumental music. 2. 02:41-05:00: Performance of 'Diva' by Tokino Sora. 3. Used on-screen credits to identify the song 'Diva' and composer 'Aira (Dream Monster)'. 4. Transcribed lyrics from on-screen subtitles for accuracy as the song is an original by the performer and not found in standard databases. 5. Translated lyrics to English.
response.global_summary: This video features a performance of the song 'Diva' by the virtual idol Tokino Sora, with an introductory promotional screen beforehand.

scenes.description: The video opens with a promotional screen featuring Tokino Sora to announce her birthday party. There is instrumental music playing.
Tokino Sora performs the song 'Diva' on a virtual stage. Lyrics are shown on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
高らかな心臓に祈りを乗せて
曖昧な夢をを描く
幻想は想像のまま
終われないんだ

Diva...
答えを永遠と探し続けて
何者かになりたくて
散々といふ有田をただながめた
やさしくよりそって
心が晴れるのなら
翼が映えたような気がして
いつだってとなりにいるから

だって言葉紡いで歌うことが
あたしの運命だ
世界にありふれた虚しささえも
上書きして
路地裏に咲いた花のように
願いを照らす
小さな光に憧れて...

名前も持たない歌なんて
神様なら認めてくれない
ひとつひとつ枯れない花のように
昨日の自分にさよならして
こぼれた涙
うまく笑えなくてもいいかな

だって理想は遠だくってくばかり
もう散々だ
どれだけ手を伸ばして叫んだって
届かないの
望めばいつか叶うはずって
信じてるから
どうか歌よ響いて

ああ心臓の鼓動が今日も
うるさい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Putting a prayer on my loud heart
Drawing a vague dream
The fantasy remains just imagination
I can't end it here

Diva...
Searching for the answer for eternity
Wanting to be someone
Just looked at the scattered fields
If I gently nestle close
And my heart clears up
I feel like wings have sprouted
Because I'm always by your side

Because spinning words and singing
Is my destiny
Even the common emptiness in the world
I'll overwrite it
Like a flower blooming in a back alley
Longing for the small light
That illuminates my wishes...

A song without even a name
God wouldn't recognize it
Like a flower that never withers one by one
Saying goodbye to yesterday's me
Spilled tears
Is it okay if I can't smile well?

Because the ideals just keep fading away
It's already a disaster
No matter how much I reach out my hand and scream
It doesn't reach
Because I believe
That if I wish for it, it will come true someday
Please, song, resonate

Ah, the heartbeat
Is loud again today
